headline: Good morning from NYC — your week ahead.
tldr: ElevenLabs recruiter pre-screen Monday 9:15 AM ET — prepare tonight (Calendar #3)
Claude API access is suspended — add billing credits today (Emails #1)
Donmar Theatre Friday conflicts with your JFK flight — resolve the ticket (Calendar #8)
Review EasyJet is 8 days overdue — clear it Thursday when the week is free (To-dos #1)
Fun Excursion tonight has no location — check where before heading out (Calendar #2)
Harriett's birthday Friday — send a message (Calendar #7)
No gym booked all week; Thursday July 2 is completely clear
intro: You're in NYC through Friday with the ElevenLabs recruiter pre-screen first thing Monday (9:15 AM ET) as the top priority — review the role tonight and find a quiet spot with good Wi-Fi. Claude API access is suspended and needs a billing top-up today (Emails #1, urgent). The Donmar Theatre booking on Friday 6 PM BST conflicts directly with your JFK departure at 7 PM ET — the ticket needs resolving. No fitness classes are booked for the week, and Thursday July 2 is completely clear.
stats: 2 open to-dos · 11 events this week · 5 unread emails (1 urgent)
